stories.title: A new survey finds 73% of firms use AI across most processes, but only 10% say it is core to the business
stories.summary: A survey of 1,550 AI decision-makers found 73 percent now use AI across most business processes, while only 10 percent say it is core to how the business runs. The gap is not the tools, it is that few firms have changed the workflows and habits around them. The useful move for a leader is to pick one process and rebuild it as if AI had been there from the start, rather than bolting a tool onto the old way of working.
